description: Style NoteA bright white flowy shirt which complements jeans and trousers is definitely a wardrobe essential for a casually formal look. This mineral shirt is one of those must haves with its feminine styling and stylish cut.Product DetailsWhite dress shirt with Dobby weave, has a spread collar with a split V neckline, a full buttoned placket with pleated ruffle down to the waist, long sleeves with elastication at the cuffs and pleated ruffle, a draw string tie belt at the back, curved hemline and flaring pintucks at the midriffMaterial and Care100% cotton Machine wash at 40 degrees with like colours Do not bleach Do not dry clean Tumble dry low Use warm ironSize and FitRegular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
